offer: For Amazon sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual report generation causes late orders and missed discounts. We convert delivery receipts into formatted reports instead of manual entry into spreadsheets.
problem: Manual processing of vendor delivery receipts leads to time-consuming report generation.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Amazon sellers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to Amazon sellers with demo video
Community forums for Amazon seller tools
try_it: Let users try receipt scanning on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing manual workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first users
Post weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing vendor data
Streamline onboarding process for new users
